-(%0A    %22fmt%22%0A    %22os%22%0A    %22bufio%22%0A)%0Afunc main() %7B%0A    l:= bufio.NewReader (os.Stdin)%0A    texto, _:= l.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A    p1, _:= l.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A    p2, _:= l.ReadString('%5Cn')%0A    texto= texto%5B:len(texto)-1%5D%0A    p1= p1%5B:len(p1)-1%5D%0A    p2= p2%5B:len(p2)-1%5D%0A    m:= make(map%5Brune%5Drune)%0A    for i:=0; i%3Clen(p1); i++%7B%0A        m%5Brune(p1%5Bi%5D)%5D= rune(p2%5Bi%5D)%0A        m%5Brune(p2%5Bi%5D)%5D= rune(p1%5Bi%5D)%0A    %7D%0A    for _, c:= range texto%7B%0A        if troca, existe:= m%5Bc%5D; existe%7B%0A            fmt.Print(string(troca))%0A        %7D else%7B%0A            fmt.Print(string(c))%0A        %7D%0A    %7D
